title: 🧬 Parasite Sigils
name: Parasite Sigils
what_it_is: Symbols that attach and feed on energy—parasitic glyphs that infect objects, thoughts, or people, slowly draining or altering meaning.
how_to_use: she wears the sigil unknowingly—it feeds on attention, warping her words
he scratches at the glyph—each thought makes it grow stronger
animation_behavior: Glyphs twitch with stimuli, grow when noticed, infect nearby elements, pulse in sync with host thought
